message:
feat(cli): add fleet transfer subcommands and fleet-wide reporting CLI

New CLI subcommands under 'pt agent fleet transfer':
- export: bundle priors and signatures with optional encryption and
  host profile redaction for secure cross-host transfer
- import: merge incoming bundle with configurable strategy (weighted,
  replace, keep-local) and baseline normalization. Supports dry-run.
- diff: preview what would change before committing an import

New 'pt agent fleet report' command for fleet-wide reporting with
deterministic section ordering and profile redaction.

Also includes formatting improvements to existing CLI argument structs
and test assertions throughout main.rs for consistency.

Closes process_triage-hc7.4 (fleet-wide reporting).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
